message:
✨ Support nested solution directories and new template format (#1539)

- Solutions fetch now recursively traverses nested directories (max 3 levels)
  to find JSON files in structures like solutions/cncf-generated/project/file.json
- normalizeMission() updated to handle both old (format/exportedAt) and new
  (version/name/missionClass/sourceUrls) template formats
- Extract source URLs from sourceUrls object with fallback to legacy fields

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
